Task.Name: Public Storage - 1061 Cudahy Place San Diego CA

City List of Items to resolve before Pre-Con Meeting can happen DELAY

Grade & Pour Site Walks Bollards & Gate Tracks

CMU Walls/Ledgers to 29' (3rd floor - exterior scaffold)

Install Offsite Fire Tie In & Lateral
Install Site Sewer line to Bldg.
